title: Customer Segmentation Analysis
shortDescription: Identify distinct customer segments with TAM sizing, willingness-to-pay, and targeting priority.

inputs.label: Product Description
inputs.example: Scheduling automation platform that eliminates back-and-forth emails for booking meetings

inputs.label: Current Customer Base Description
inputs.example: Primarily sales teams and recruiters at mid-market SaaS companies, some individual consultants and coaches

inputs.label: Market Context
inputs.example: Scheduling tools market growing 15% YoY, increasing competition from CRM-embedded scheduling, remote work driving demand

inputs.label: Segmentation Dimensions
inputs.example: Company size, industry, use case, buyer role, tech stack maturity

inputs.label: Strategic Goal
inputs.example: Expand beyond sales use case into cross-functional enterprise scheduling
